title: VimFu — :g/{pattern}/{cmd} Global Command
description: The :g (global) command executes an ex command on every line matching a pattern.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim

steps.say: The global command runs an ex command on every line that matches a pattern.
Delete every line that contains TODO.
All three TODO comments are gone. The functions remain. Global found each matching line and ran D for delete.
Colon G slash pattern slash command. The global command. One of Vim's most powerful features.
